contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Let's talk.

descriptions.React: Led the development team behind the RunMyProcess platform redesign, building 50+ components for the rendering engine and improving load times by 35%. Contributed to transitioning the codebase from pure JS to a component-based architecture at VeriTran. Built a crypto payment frontend at ExcelAscent.
descriptions.TypeScript: Typed the RunMyProcess low-code rendering engine and 50+ UI components as part of the platform-wide redesign focused on scalable architecture. Enhanced the VeriTran financial platform with strict TypeScript, reducing runtime errors.
descriptions.JavaScript: Core language across all roles. Built interactive frontend features, real-time integrations, and contributed to a full JS-to-TypeScript migration at VeriTran.
descriptions.HTML/CSS: Structured and styled interfaces for enterprise low-code platforms, financial apps, and client-facing payment systems.
descriptions.Redux: Managed complex application state in the RunMyProcess low-code platform and VeriTran financial tools, including real-time data flows and drag-and-drop interactions.
descriptions.Tailwind CSS: Adopted for rapid UI development at RunMyProcess and personal projects like this portfolio, enabling consistent, responsive designs.
descriptions.WebSockets: Integrated WebSocket-based real-time communication for the VeriTran financial platform. Used Socket.io for live cryptocurrency price visualization at ExcelAscent.
descriptions.GraphQL: Implemented GraphQL to unify the API schema of the crypto payment platform, replacing multiple REST endpoints with a single flexible query layer.
descriptions.REST APIs: Designed and consumed RESTful services for enterprise platforms, financial integrations, and payment systems across multiple companies.
descriptions.Node.js: Built backend services and tooling at VeriTran. Developed server-side logic for the crypto platform at ExcelAscent and internal systems at TD7.
descriptions.Express.js: Created REST API servers for the crypto payment system at ExcelAscent and backend web services at Tecnología Digital 7.
descriptions.MongoDB: Managed large volumes of transactional data for the crypto investment platform at ExcelAscent. Used for data persistence at TD7.
descriptions.Jest: Wrote unit and integration tests for low-code platform components at RunMyProcess and financial application modules at VeriTran.
descriptions.Git: Version control and collaboration across all professional roles, managing codebases with multiple contributors and release workflows.
descriptions.Confluence: Maintained technical documentation covering 50+ components for the RunMyProcess rendering engine and internal platform guidelines.
descriptions.Figma: Led UX prototyping and design for the RunMyProcess platform redesign, defining the new user experience and collaborating with the development team to implement pixel-perfect interfaces.
descriptions.UI/UX Design: Led the implementation of a new user experience at RunMyProcess, driving a comprehensive UI redesign that improved usability by 30% and defining the UX roadmap across 3 product lines. Built visual construction tools with drag & drop at VeriTran.
descriptions.Stakeholder Management: Aligned technical decisions with business goals across multiple product lines. Bridged communication between engineering, product, and executive teams.
descriptions.Technical Leadership: Led frontend teams, defined technical direction, conducted code reviews, and mentored junior developers. Drove architecture decisions for platform-wide redesigns.
descriptions.Product Strategy: Defined the UX roadmap across 3 product lines at RunMyProcess. Prioritized features based on user research, business impact, and technical feasibility.
descriptions.Agile & Scrum: Worked in Agile environments with sprint planning, retrospectives, and daily standups. Led sprint ceremonies and backlog refinement sessions.
descriptions.Cross-functional Collaboration: Coordinated across engineering, design, QA, and product teams to deliver cohesive features. Facilitated workshops and design reviews.
descriptions.Strategic Negotiation: Negotiated technical scope, timelines, and resource allocation with stakeholders. Balanced business demands with engineering capacity.
descriptions.Business Analysis: Translated business requirements into technical specifications. Conducted competitive analysis and user research to inform product decisions.
descriptions.Next.js: Built full-stack applications with Next.js for Clinity and multiple personal projects including Copairo, Mudanzas Pereira, Café Independencia, and Casa de Asterión.
descriptions.SEO: Optimized web applications for search engines with structured data, meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap generation, and Core Web Vitals performance tuning.
descriptions.PostgreSQL: Designed and managed relational databases for web applications, handling migrations, queries, and data modeling.
descriptions.Python: Built a PL/0 compiler, automation scripts, and backend services. Used for data processing and AI integrations.
descriptions.Docker: Containerized applications for consistent development and deployment environments. Built multi-stage Docker images for production.
descriptions.Kubernetes: Orchestrated containerized deployments, managed scaling and service discovery for cloud-native applications.
descriptions.AWS S3: Managed static asset storage, file uploads, and content delivery for web applications.
descriptions.AWS CloudFront: Configured CDN distribution for fast global content delivery with custom domains and SSL certificates.
descriptions.AWS EC2: Deployed and managed virtual servers for web applications and backend services.
descriptions.AWS ECS: Managed container orchestration on AWS for scalable application deployments.
descriptions.CI/CD: Set up continuous integration and deployment pipelines with GitHub Actions, automating testing, building, and deployment workflows.
descriptions.OpenAI: Integrated OpenAI APIs for AI-powered features including text generation, embeddings, and intelligent assistants.
descriptions.Anthropic: Integrated Claude API for AI-powered workflows, code generation, and intelligent automation.
descriptions.Google Gemini: Explored Gemini API for multimodal AI capabilities and content generation.
descriptions.Vercel: Deployed and managed Next.js applications on Vercel with custom domains, edge functions, and analytics.
descriptions.Accessibility: Implemented WCAG guidelines, semantic HTML, ARIA attributes, and keyboard navigation to ensure inclusive web experiences.
